svg.title: Admin flow diagram — from login to settlement
svg.desc: Complete admin workflow: login, setup phase (company, zone, city, store, lab, panel), operations phase (add candidates, book appointments, track visits, upload reports), and settlement.
svg.text: Everything the admin does — from first login to final settlement

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does admin login look like — what credentials are used?')

svg.text: One-time setup — done once when a new company is onboarded

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What fields are needed when creating a company?')
sendPrompt('How are zones created — are they pre-seeded or typed in?')
sendPrompt('How are cities linked to zones?')
sendPrompt('What is the 3-step store creation wizard?')
g.text: Store code, name, address, store head

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What information is needed to register a lab?')
sendPrompt('How does the admin create a test panel with 3-tier pricing?')
g.text: MRP / cost to client / cost to vendor

svg.text: Daily operations — repeated for every checkup cycle

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the admin add candidates to a store?')
sendPrompt('How does the admin book an appointment for a candidate?')
sendPrompt('What does the lab do when they confirm a booking?')

svg.text: Completion — after the candidate visits and lab uploads results
